fnolScenes.title: Initial Contact & Safety Check
fnolScenes.objective: Assess immediate safety and emergency status
fnolScenes.description: Bob is calling to report an accident. Alice answers and immediately assesses if there are safety/medical emergencies. Questions cover injury status, safety from traffic, need for emergency services, and hazardous materials.

fnolScenes.title: Policy & Policyholder Verification
fnolScenes.objective: Verify policy and collect contact information
fnolScenes.description: Once safety is confirmed, Alice verifies the policy number and gets Bob's full contact information. Confirms policy is active and in-force on date of loss.

fnolScenes.title: Reporter Type & Relationship
fnolScenes.objective: Establish who is making the report and their role
fnolScenes.description: Determine if Bob is the driver or if someone else was driving. Verify driver information and policy scope. Check for underage or excluded driver issues.

fnolScenes.title: Accident Date, Time & Location
fnolScenes.objective: Establish precise timeline and location of loss
fnolScenes.description: Gather exact date, time of accident, and current time of report. Collect full address, road type, weather conditions, visibility, and road conditions. Note any reporting delays.

fnolScenes.title: Type of Loss & What Happened
fnolScenes.objective: Classify loss and get Bob's account in his own words
fnolScenes.description: Classify type of loss (collision, parking damage, animal strike, etc.). Get Bob's free-form narrative about how the accident happened. Identify liability signals and assess who had right-of-way.

fnolScenes.title: Driver Details & Coverage Scope
fnolScenes.objective: Verify driver license validity and policy coverage scope
fnolScenes.description: Verify valid driver's license with number, expiry, and class. Ask about alcohol/drugs and medications. Check if driver is within policy scope and coverage exclusions.

fnolScenes.title: Other Party / Third Party Details
fnolScenes.objective: Gather other party identification and insurance details
fnolScenes.description: If collision with another vehicle, collect other driver's name, contact, license plate, VIN, vehicle details, insurance company, and policy number. Determine if other party admits fault and if lawyer is involved.

fnolScenes.title: Police Report & Authorities
fnolScenes.objective: Determine police involvement and gather reference information
fnolScenes.description: Ask if police attended the scene. Collect police report number, station, fines issued, and any criminal charges or administrative offenses. Flag for SIU if hit-and-run.

fnolScenes.title: Witnesses
fnolScenes.description: Collect names and contact information for independent witnesses. Gather passenger information from both vehicles. Note that independent witnesses are highly valuable for investigation.

fnolScenes.title: Injuries & Medical
fnolScenes.objective: Determine extent of personal injuries and treatment
fnolScenes.description: Assess injuries for Bob, passengers, and other party. Gather treatment information (hospital, outpatient, or none). Collect health insurance details and anticipated time off work.

fnolScenes.title: Property Damage Assessment
fnolScenes.objective: Assess vehicle damage and current status
fnolScenes.description: Get description of damage location and extent. Determine if vehicle is drivable. Find out where vehicle is currently located and whether it was towed. Check for prior damage in same area.

fnolScenes.title: Coverage Scope & Exclusions Check
fnolScenes.objective: Verify coverage applies and identify exclusions
fnolScenes.description: Verify vehicle was being used for private personal driving. Ask about commercial use, modifications, emissions/registration status. Identify any use outside policy scope or exclusion triggers.

fnolScenes.title: Fraud Signal Assessment
fnolScenes.objective: Screen for fraud indicators through routine verification
fnolScenes.description: Ask routine screening questions: when damage noticed, when reported to insurer, if Bob knows other party, prior claims history, vehicle sale status. Flag multiple indicators for SIU review.

fnolScenes.title: Settlement Preferences & Next Steps
fnolScenes.objective: Understand Bob's immediate needs and set expectations
fnolScenes.description: Discuss rental vehicle needs, preferred repair shop, contact preferences. Explain next steps, timeline, and documentation needed. Summarize conversation and set follow-up plan.

defaultConnections.condition: Proceed to settlement and next steps
